channel.title: grammar on faŋtrəntrəŋ-pages
channel.description: Recent content in grammar on faŋtrəntrəŋ-pages

item.title: part of sentence
item.description:
english explain
subject 主语 the person or thing that performs the action of a verb, or is joined to a description by a verb
object 宾语 a noun or noun phrase that is affected by the action of a verb or that follows a preposition
apposition 同位语 in grammar, a situation in which two nouns or noun phrases are used to refer to the same person or thing 同一位置名词或名词短语的另一种解释
attributive 定语 of an adjective, noun, pronoun, or phrase placed before the noun
predicate 谓语 in grammar, the part of a sentence that contains the verb and gives information about the subject 主语相关信息
predicative 表语 (in grammar, especially of adjectives or phrases) following a verb
adverbial 状语 a word or phrase that operates as an adverb in a sentence

complement: a part of a clause that usually follows the verb in English and adds more information about the subject or object补语

item.title: part of speech
item.description:
词性介绍

adj:adjective

a word that describes a noun or pronoun 描述名词或代词

conj:conjunction

a word such as ‘and’, ‘but’, ‘while’, or ‘although’ that connects words, phrases, and clauses in a sentence

and;both and

but;or;nor;for

连词

interj:interjection

a word or phrase that is used as a short, sudden expression of emotion.

感叹词

n:noun

a word that refers to a person, place, thing, event, substance, or quality.

pron:pronoun

a word that is used instead of a noun or a noun phrase.替代名词或名词短语
